title: Pocketwatchery
description: Adds some neat pocketwatches (one word don't @ me)
body:
## Overview
Adds four pocketwaches & two ingredients to make the pocketwatches.

# Items
## Ingredients
### Time Sand
Dig up sand and maybe get some of this stuff! You probably need some *luck*, it's rare!
### Time Crystal
Combine time sand and a diamond, get a time crystal! Use this to make and repair your pocketwatches.
## Pocketwatches
### Pocketwatch (aka Clocketwatch)
Tells the time! Very expensive because very cool feature.

### Overgrown Pocketwatch
Grows plants and stuff!

### Youthful Pocketwatch
Your pups and kitties will never grow up.

### Overclocked Pocketwatch
Zoom zoom you speedy now.

# Usage
* Right click to open and close your pocketwatch! Wow it makes cool noises!
* Sneak + right click while the pocketwatch is open to use it! It does things!
